title: Juggernaut
content:
{{AltUniverse|3=Characters}}
{{Character
|image = Juggernaut.png
|real name = {{Conjecture|Cain Marko}}{{Ref|ConjecCode}}
|alias = {{Alias
|codenames = Juggernaut{{Ref|DW}}}}
|species = [[Mutant]]
|citizenship = {{Citizenship|USA}}
|gender = Male
|DOD = [[Void (End of Time)|End of Time]]{{Ref|DW}}
|affiliation = {{Affiliation|CNH}}
|movie = ''[[Deadpool & Wolverine]]''
|actor = [[Aaron W. Reed]]
|status = Deceased}}
{{Quote|You must be this year's Juggernaut.|[[Deadpool]] to Juggernaut|Deadpool & Wolverine}}
'''{{Conjecture|Cain Marko}}''' was a [[mutant]] known as '''Juggernaut''' who was banished to the [[Void (End of Time)|Void]] and served [[Cassandra Nova]] as one of her [[Cassandra Nova's Henchmen|henchmen]]. Since his [[Juggernaut's Helmet|helmet]] could nullify psychic abilities and could be used to subdue Nova, Juggernaut was targeted by the [[Resistance]] when they [[Assault on Cassandra Nova's Lair|attacked]] Nova's [[Cassandra Nova's Lair|lair]]. In the ensuing fight, Juggernaut's feet were cut off by [[X-23]]'s [[adamantium]] claws, causing him to lose balance and fall to the ground. Juggernaut was then decapitated by X-23, who successfully removed his helmet and gave it to [[Deadpool]] and [[Wolverine]].

==Biography==
===Sent to the Void===
Juggernaut was a [[mutant]] who possessed great physical strength and a [[Juggernaut's Helmet|special helmet]] capable of blocking out and nullifying psychic powers. At some point in time, Juggernaut was apprehended by the [[Time Variance Authority]], who banished him to the [[Void (End of Time)|Void]].{{Ref|DW}}

===Henchman to Cassandra Nova===
====Joining Cassandra Nova====
{{Quote|In the [[Void (End of Time)|Void]]... you're either food for [[Alioth]]... or you work for [[Cassandra Nova|her]].|[[Human Torch/Void-Analyzing Fantastic Four|Human Torch]] to [[Deadpool]] and [[Wolverine]]|Deadpool & Wolverine}}
Now stranded in the [[Void (End of Time)|Void]], Juggernaut eventually encountered [[Cassandra Nova]], a powerful [[mutant]] with free rein over the Void. In exchange for ensuring his own survival, Juggernaut pledged his allegiances to Nova, joining her roster of [[Cassandra Nova's Henchmen|henchmen]] at a [[Cassandra Nova's Lair|makeshift lair]] within the corpse of [[Giant-Man/Giant-Man Pruned|Giant-Man]]. Juggernaut's presence amongst Nova's henchmen was later noted by [[Resistance]] member [[Human Torch/Void-Analyzing Fantastic Four|Human Torch]], who explicitly mentioned him to [[Deadpool]] and [[Wolverine]] while vulgarly commenting about Nova.{{Ref|DW}}

====Meeting Deadpool and Wolverine====
[[File:Juggernaut Variant.png|{{AltFloat}}|Juggernaut oversees the new arrivals]]
{{Quote|I'd keep your voices down. [[Cassandra Nova|She]] don't like the chatter.|Juggernaut to [[Deadpool]] and [[Wolverine]]|Deadpool & Wolverine}}
One day, Juggernaut was residing at [[Cassandra Nova]]'s [[Cassandra Nova's Lair|lair]] when a hunting party led by [[Pyro]] returned with [[Human Torch/Void-Analyzing Fantastic Four|Human Torch]], [[Deadpool]] and [[Wolverine]] as captives. Juggernaut was quickly identified by Deadpool as the former pulled him and Wolverine up from the ground, referring to him as "this year's Juggernaut," though Juggernaut remarked that they should keep their voices down as Nova did not like the chatter.
[[File:DeadpoolJuggernautNova.png|{{AltFloat}}|Juggernaut watches [[Cassandra Nova]]]]
As Nova emerged from the lair's inner sanctum to greet her new prisoners, Juggernaut stood off to the side and listened as Deadpool cited Human Torch's comments about Nova out loud, leading Nova to violently skin Human Torch alive with her powers. After tensions broke out between Nova and Deadpool and Wolverine when the former refused to help them leave the [[Void (End of Time)|Void]], Juggernaut retreated deeper into the lair when [[Alioth]] appeared, though Deadpool and Wolverine managed to narrowly [[Escape from Cassandra Nova's Lair|escape]] using a [[Sentinels|Sentinel]] leg.{{Ref|DW}}

====[[Assault on Cassandra Nova's Lair]]====
[[File:Juggernaut (Void).png|{{AltFloat}}|Juggernaut calls out the imminent explosion]]
{{Quote|Adiós, pendejo.<ref name="X23">Translates from Spanish to: "''Goodbye, asshole.''"</ref>|[[X-23]] to Juggernaut|Deadpool & Wolverine}}
Later, Juggernaut was posted in the [[Cassandra Nova's Lair|lair]]'s lookout tower when he spotted ''[[Ol' Betsy]]'' approaching the compound. From the vehicle, [[Blade/Universe Defender Blade|Blade]] fired a rocket at the lair's main gate, which prompted Juggernaut to call out the projectile as it destroyed the gate, allowing the [[Resistance]] to drive into the compound.
[[File:Cass Nova's Henchmen.png|{{AltFloat}}|Juggernaut prepares to fight the [[Resistance]]]]
Juggernaut quickly left his post and gathered with the other [[Cassandra Nova's Henchmen|henchmen]] in the courtyard as they confronted the intruding Resistance members. After a brief standoff, the two factions charged head-on into a [[Assault on Cassandra Nova's Lair|fierce battle]], though Juggernaut held a defensive position in front of the entrance to [[Cassandra Nova]]'s inner sanctum. As the Resistance members drew closer to the inner sanctum, Juggernaut took a hit to the head by one of [[Gambit]]'s attacks, leaving him briefly stunned.
[[File:Laura vs. Juggernaut.png|{{AltFloat}}|Juggernaut is attacked by [[X-23]]]]
Juggernaut quickly recovered from the attack and continued to fight the Resistance with the other remaining henchmen. Juggernaut was then attacked by [[X-23]], who lept onto him and repeatedly stabbed him in the shoulders using her [[adamantium]] claws, though Juggernaut retaliated by throwing her off. Juggernaut charged towards X-23, who dodged his incoming attack and sliced his ankles, causing him great pain.
[[File:X-23 vs. Juggernaut.png|{{AltFloat}}|Juggernaut is depacitated by X-23]]
Juggernaut turned to face X-23, though as he tried to step forward, he quickly discovered that his feet had been severed from the rest of his legs. Juggernaut screamed out in pain and collapsed onto his knees, where he could only watch in horror as X-23 pounced at him and swiftly decapitated him.{{Ref|DW}}

===Legacy===
[[File:Headless Juggernaut.png|{{AltFloat}}|Juggernaut's headless corpse]]
[[X-23]] recovered Juggernaut's [[Juggernaut's Helmet|helmet]] from his corpse, which remained upright while the [[Resistance]] continued to battle the remnants of [[Cassandra Nova's Henchmen]]. Juggernaut's helmet was then delivered to [[Deadpool]] and [[Wolverine]] to impair [[Cassandra Nova]], though after she was shot by [[Pyro]], Wolverine discarded the helmet to let Nova heal as he knew that [[Professor X/Mutant Genocide|Charles Xavier]] would not let him stand there and watch Nova die.{{Ref|DW}}

==Powers and Abilities==
===Powers===
*'''Mutant Physiology''': Cain Marko was a mutant who possessed many superhuman attributes, including superhuman strength which made him the “brute” of [[Cassandra Nova's Henchmen]]. Juggernaut's signature move is the irresistible force generated as he moves in a constant direction and gradually accelerates. The force of this knock generated in the acceleration could be extremely destructive, although X-23 utilized Marko's weakness, cutting his feet off so he cannot perform this attack, rendering Juggernaut immobile which made him an easy kill.
**'''Superhuman Strength''': [[File:Juggernaut lifting Deadpool and Wolverine.png|thumb|250px|Juggernaut lifts [[Deadpool]] and [[Wolverine]]]] Juggernaut could effortlessly lift both [[Deadpool]] and [[Wolverine]] up from the ground with just one hand and throw [[X-23]] a considerable distance after ripping her off his shoulders even while injured.
**'''Superhuman Durability''': Juggernaut was able to endure a blast of kinetic energy from [[Gambit]] and multiple stab wounds from X-23's [[adamantium]] claws.
**'''Superhuman Speed''': ''To be added''
**'''Superhuman Agility''': ''To be added''
**'''Superhuman Stamina''': ''To be added''
**'''Superhuman Reflexes''': ''To be added''
*'''[[Juggernaut's Helmet|Helmet]] Capabilities''': Juggernaut wore a helmet which provided him psychic protection against mind-based attacks.
**'''Psychic Immunity''': Juggernaut's helmet could nullify and weaken the psychic abilities of telepaths, which the Resistance used to subdue [[Cassandra Nova]].

===Abilities===
*'''Expert Combatant''': ''To be added''

==Equipment==
*'''[[Juggernaut's Helmet|Helmet]]''': [[File:Juggernaut & Azazel.png|thumb|250px|Juggernaut wearing his helmet]] Juggernaut's helmet could nullify certain psychic abilties. Due to his helmet's unique properties, he was quickly targeted by the [[Resistance]] in order to obtain his helmet to counter [[Cassandra Nova]]'s powers. After Juggernaut was killed by [[X-23]], his helmet was used to briefly shut down Nova's telepathic powers, though the helmet was soon discarded in order to let Nova recover from the gunshot wounds inflicted on her by [[Pyro]].

==Trivia==
*In the comics, Cain Marko is a [[human]] who was empowered by the [[w:c:marvel:Crimson Gem of Cyttorak|Crimson Gem of Cyttorak]] and became '''Juggernaut''', the human avatar of [[Cyttorak]]. Despite not being a [[mutant]], he is a prominent member of the {{WPS|Brotherhood of Mutants}} and a frequent enemy of the [[X-Men]]. He is also the stepbrother of [[Charles Xavier]].

==Behind the Scenes==
*Juggernaut in the [[Marvel Cinematic Universe]] is the second live-action incarnation of the character following an incarnation from {{WPS|20th Century Fox}}'s {{WPS|X-Men (film series)|''X-Men'' film series}}, who was portrayed by {{WPS|Vinnie Jones}} in ''{{WPS|X-Men: The Last Stand}}'' and by [[Ryan Reynolds (actor)|Ryan Reynolds]] in ''{{WPS|Deadpool 2}}''.
**Juggernaut is specifically a Variant of the one from [[Earth-10005]], based off of ''{{WPS|X-Men: The Last Stand}}''.{{Ref|TAoDW}}
**Jones was originally offered to reprise the role in ''[[Deadpool & Wolverine]]'', but rejected the offer over complaints regarding the suit and the lack of budget for it from [[Marvel Studios]].<ref>[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=iBl4_1iNrDE Vinnie Jones on turning down Deadpool & Wolverine, reuniting with Guy Ritchie and X-Men 'shambles']</ref>
